name: AS4 - ebMS3 Messaging (Failure)
description: Simulates an AS4 endpoint returning a SOAP Fault. Use to test CPI AS4 error handling.

config.response_body: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><env:Envelope xmlns:env="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope"><env:Body><env:Fault><env:Code><env:Value>env:Receiver</env:Value></env:Code><env:Reason><env:Text xml:lang="en">AS4 processing failed: party not recognised</env:Text></env:Reason></env:Fault></env:Body></env:Envelope>
